Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Written Discovery; And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-24-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alice K. Koh, Esq. of the Law Offices of Catherine A. Walsh, T:925.825.9500, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

Defendant's counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT GLENN HENRY's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Written Discovery; And Request For Monetary Sanctions, as follows:

Defendant's motion to compel Plaintiff's response to Special Interrogatories, Set Two; and Demand for Inspection, Set Two, is unopposed and granted. Defendant shall serve verified responses without objection within fifteen days of service of a copy of this Order with Notice of Entry. Monetary sanctions are awarded in the sum of $450.00 to be paid within the aforesaid fifteen days.

Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Supplemental Discovery; And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alice Loh, Esq. 925-825-9500 Law Office of Catherine Walsh for Defendant GLENN HENRY.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GLENN HENRY's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Supplemental Discovery; And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Motion GRANTED. Defendant shall provide complete responses, without objections, to the supplemental interrogatory and request for production no later than September 6, 2019. The request for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $450 (2 hours at $195/hour plus $60 filing), payable by September 6, 2019.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
